properties.formula:
URLRoot() & "db/" & Dbid() & "?act=API_EditRecord&apptoken=c98jgpxw6rnv2cp98u7rckwaxw4"
& "&_fid_59=" & Now()
& "&_fid_60=" & UserToEmail(User())
& "&rid=" & [Record ID#] 
& "&rdr=" & URLEncode(URLRoot() & "db/bstdqwrkg" & "?a=er&act=dr&rid=" & [Record ID#])

URLRoot() & "db/" & Dbid() & "?act=API_EditRecord&apptoken=c98jgpxw6rnv2cp98u7rckwaxw4" 
& "&_fid_8=Open"
& "&_fid_64=" & Now()
& "&_fid_63=" & UserToEmail(User())
& "&rid=" & [Record ID#] 
& "&rdr=" & URLEncode(URLRoot() & "db/bstdqwrkg" & "?a=er&act=dr&rid=" & [Record ID#])
If(IsNull([Adjusted Due Date]),[Due Date],[Adjusted Due Date])

URLRoot() & "db/" & [_DBID_Tickets] & "?a=API_EditRecord" & "&rid=" & [Record ID#]
& "&_fid_117="&URLEncode(ToText([Ticket Followers])&ToText(User()))
& "&_fid_113="&URLEncode(UserToName(User())&" has started following this ticket")
&"&rdr=" & URLEncode(URLRoot() & "db/" & Dbid() & "?a=er&rid=" & [Record ID#])
If(IsNull([Completed Timestamp]) or IsNull([Requested Timestamp]),null,ToDays([Completed Timestamp]-[Requested Timestamp]))

Case([Ticket Status],
"On Track","Incomplete",
"Behind Schedule","Incomplete",
"Ahead of Schedule","Incomplete",
"Complete","Complete")

var Text realmHostName = NotRight(NotLeft(URLRoot(), 8), "/");
"https://api.plugins.quickbase.com/launch?pluginId=qb-uploader&pid=" & [Record ID#] & "&configId=32pUr4yTvX1LlbFAlV0kjH3f8QW&appId="&AppID()&"&realmHostname=" & URLEncode($realmHostName)

label: Max Ticket Note Record ID# - Note by
Max Ticket Note Record ID# - Date Created
